payload.summary: Repair the rejected receipt contract by making fishtoucher.invocation/v1 a required serialized protocol marker.
payload.base_revision: 9e38d87 plus the rejected packet-001 candidate diff
acceptance: Define the exact protocol constant fishtoucher.invocation/v1.
Require protocol as an exact top-level receipt field and reject any other value.
Add focused validator tests for valid, missing, and wrong protocol markers.
Add a CLI regression proving the wrong protocol fails through the invocation command.
Preserve every previously accepted structural and semantic check.
claims: The initial failed attempt remains preserved as mailbox sequences 3 through 6.
requests: Return exact verification output and fresh request/response hashes.
payload.provider_note: The repair must again be authored by paid DeepSeek V4 Pro through the registered secure adapter; the Codex coordinator may transport and apply the response mechanically.
